advancements.buildcraftenergy.ice_cool.d: Cool a combustion engine with something else then water (if available)
advancements.buildcraftenergy.lava_power: Power a stirling engine with a lava bucket

advancements.buildcrafttransport.categor: Setup a sorting setup using the power of colouring
advancements.buildcrafttransport.colorfu: Use 16 of each color of pipe wire to make your piping system more robust
advancements.buildcrafttransport.extende: Use a gate with extra slots
advancements.buildcrafttransport.pipe_di: Place a item, fluid, kinesis and structure pipe
advancements.buildcrafttransport.pipe_fa: Place down one of each type of pipe

increase conversion rate.

Clicking this with an empty bucket will
empty this tank into the bucket, or
using a full bucket will fill this tank
from the bucket.
